description.@value: CLIMATE-ADAPT4EOSC is a Horizon Europe project dedicated to establishing a seamless, EOSC-centred collaborative research environment for climate change adaptation.

creator.name: NATIONAL CENTER FOR SCIENTIFIC RESEARCH DEMOKRITOS (NCSRD)
creator.description: Project coordination (WP8), multi-scale climate hazard simulation, HPC/digital twin modeling.

creator.name: ARTELIA (ART)
creator.description: WP6 lead; engineering services for water/energy; lead on clay risk assessment/mapping (UC3).

creator.name: ASSOCIACAO INCD (INCD)
creator.description: Infrastructure provider (EOSC/EGI cloud); technical deployment and integration support.

creator.name: TECHNOVATIVE SOLUTIONS LTD (TVS)
creator.description: WP1 lead; AI/ML model architectures, climate adaptation toolkits, big data analytics (BDAnalytics).

creator.name: THE CHANCELLOR MASTERS AND SCHOLARS OF THE UNIVERSITY OF CAMBRIDGE (UCAM)
creator.description: WP4 lead; cross-domain knowledge graphs, HPC (CSD3) analysis, semantic interoperability.

creator.name: THE UNIVERSITY OF MANCHESTER (UNIMAN)
creator.description: WP2 lead; provenance/FAIR expert, RO-Crate development, privacy-preserving policy engine.

creator.name: GAC (GAC)
creator.description: WP7 lead; policy dialogue, project dissemination, communication, and exploitation strategy.

creator.name: COMITE DES DONNEES SCIENTIFIQUES ETTECHNOLOGIQUES ASSOCIATION (CODATA)
creator.description: WP3 lead; Data policy & legal interoperability; Cross-Domain Interoperability Framework (CDIF).

creator.name: ETHNIKO ASTEROSKOPEIO ATHINON (NOA)
creator.description: Weather/climate prediction; climate indicators, high-resolution micro-climatic modeling.

creator.name: DIMOS EGALEO (EGL)
creator.description: Piloting partner, user validation, urban resilience (Just-CURS) demonstration site.

creator.name: APA-ADMINISTRACAO DO PORTO DE AVEIRO SA (APA)
creator.description: Portuguese data space provider; Aveiro port management/demo infrastructure provider.

creator.name: CENTRE SCIENTIFIQUE ET TECHNIQUE DU BATIMENT (CSTB)
creator.description: Building/territory resilience expert; end-user validation for UC3 (clay risk).

creator.name: DATA4 SERVICES POLAND SP. Z O.O. (DATA4)
creator.description: Data center provider; industrial operational validation for UC3 (clay risk) in Poland.

creator.name: NOVITOPIA BILGI TEKNOLOJILERI LIMITED SIRKET (NVTP)
creator.description: Full-stack dev; ML implementation, software development for project services (WP2, WP4, WP5).

creator.name: BUREAU DE RECHERCHES GEOLOGIQUES ET MINIERES (BRGM)
creator.description: Geological survey expert; end-user validation for UC3 (clay risk), hydrogeological expertise.

creator.name: SIKT - KUNNSKAPSSEKTORENS TJENESTELEVERANDOR (SIKT)
creator.description: Data sharing/open research services; CDIF collaboration, organizational interoperability framework.

creator.name: IANUS TECHNOLOGIES LTD (IANUS)
creator.description: Digital tools for risk management; urban vulnerability software, IT support, replication (Cyprus).
